name: course-upgrader
description: Marketplace for the Course Upgrader plugin — an AI agent that audits a resume against real course listings to find courses teaching genuinely new skills instead of redundant ones.

plugins.name: course-upgrader
plugins.description: Compares a candidate's resume against real course listings (Coursera, Udemy, edX, Simplilearn, Great Learning, Google Digital Garage) to compute an Overlap Rate, Skill Delta, and Match Score for every recommendation.
